title: Dr. Beckmann Service-it Washing Machine Cleaner | 250 ml | Pack of 3
features: A liquid Washing Machine Cleaner to clean, freshen and maintain your washing machine
Removes limescale, dirt, detergent residues from hard-to-reach parts like the drum, pipes and seals of your machine
Prevents breakdowns and prolongs the life of your washing machine when used regularly
Conditions rubber parts such as seals and tubes - Corrosion inhibitors protect metal parts inside your machine
Activated carbon attracts dissolved particles removing the dirt and grime that creates nasty odours
description: Product Description " Dr. Beckmann Service-it Washing Machine Cleaner works to eliminate detergent residue from the drum, pipes and seals of your machine, removing the dirt and grime that creates nasty odours. If applied regularly, the drum, this will not only protects the machine, but also enable energy-efficient washing and a long service life of the machine. Directions for use 1. Clean filter. Shake bottle well before use. Remove detergent drawer and soak it for 30 min in a solution of 50 ml washing machine cleaner (see marking) diluted in 4 liters of warm water. Clean the dispenser of any residue and insert it back into the machine. 2. Pour a small amount of the cleaner onto a cloth and wipe the window pane and rubber seal. For maintenance, leave it to work shortly and wipe off with a damp cloth. 3. Pour remaining content of the bottle into the main detergent compartment and start main wash cycle (at least 40 °C) without pre-wash cycle, without detergent and without laundry. Important Information - Always follow manufacturer's manual - Thus, malfunctioning can be prevented - For a long lifespan of the machine - Use once a month for optimum results " Ingredients /
